body.title: central operations log tree + Igor instance home migration to ~/.unseen_university/
body.text:
# D-adc-ops-log-tree-2026-04-27
**title:** central operations log tree + Igor instance home migration to ~/.unseen_university/
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-ops-log-tree, T-adc-console-capture, T-adc-chat-history-migrate, T-adc-instance-home-migration

## Decision narrative

All agent runtime data migrates from ~/.TheIgors/ into a hierarchical ~/.unseen_university/ tree. Logs live at ~/.unseen_university/logs/<system|comms-channel>/ (CC.0 comms channel = CC chat history, Igor-wild-0001 = Igor subsystem logs). Instance flat files live at ~/.unseen_university/Igor-wild-0001/. UNSEEN_UNIVERSITY_HOME env var configures the root (default ~/.unseen_university/). Console capture via tmux pipe-pane (rolling 7d). Igor's reading library is ~/.unseen_university/Igor-wild-0001/library/ — personal reference, not reader-utility state. Hard cutover with symlink safety net during transition window. agentctl init stamps the full tree idempotently.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-28T00:38:20.387362+00:00
**Ticket count:** 4 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-ops-log-tree (M) — UnseenUniversity: central log tree + UNSEEN_UNIVERSITY_HOME env var  `done` — UNSEEN_UNIVERSITY_HOME env var, unseen_university_home/logs helpers, agentctl init --instance stamps full tree, LoggingControlCenter auto-configures from env, IgorDevice/Shim defaults updated
- T-adc-console-capture (S) — UnseenUniversity: tmux console capture for Igor and CC sessions  `done` — tmux pipe-pane in igor launcher → ~/.unseen_university/logs/Igor-wild-0001/YYYYMMDD.console.log; prune_console_logs.py for 7d retention; CC console = JSONL transcript (handled by chat-history-migrate)
- T-adc-chat-history-migrate (S) — UnseenUniversity: move CC chat history to ~/.unseen_university/logs/CC.0/  `done` — export_chat.py default → ~/.unseen_university/logs/CC.0/; files moved; symlink from old path; verified writing to new location
- T-adc-instance-home-migration (L) — UnseenUniversity: migrate ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ to ~/.unseen_university/  `done` — Moved ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ → ~/.unseen_university/Igor-wild-0001/; symlink from old → new; IgorDevice + IgorShim already default to new path; Igor verified healthy post-migration

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
